alkylation reagent: alkylated with 375 mM iodoacetamide for 30 min in the dark
alkylation concentration: alkylated with 375 mM iodoacetamide for 30 min in the dark
cleavage agent: suspended in TEAB buffer and trypsin for overnight digestion at 37 °C

instrument: coupled to an OrbiTrap Q Exactive, via an EasySpray source
labeling: Mass spectrometry proteomic analysis of differentially labeled TMT proteins
